description: Night 1 baseline: 3 correlated subqueries + separate COUNT
Replace 3 correlated subqueries with 2 LATERAL JOINs (-7.3%)
Add indexes on turns(task_id,created_at) and issue_comments(issue_id,created_at) (-5.9%)
Eliminate COUNT(*) round-trip with window function (-25.8%)
Partial index on issues(archived, last_turn_at, updated_at)
CTE + DISTINCT ON for bulk turn/comment lookup: no gain
Exclude description from SELECT i.* — 80% payload reduction (-24.4%)
